The '''Kob sonic blaster''', also known as the '''Nagai sonic blaster''', was a [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blaster]] developed by the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] raiders.

==Description==
A weapon that saw widespread use among [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] raiders, the Kob sonic blaster was the size of a large pistol or small rifle, often including a fore-grip, and was considered an elegant weapon due to its versatility.<ref name="Gamer1" /><ref name="TNEGTWAT" /><ref name="SW102" />

The Kob sonic blaster utilized a controlled harmonic wave that could be set to a wide variety of power settings including its lowest setting, "light stun", which emitted a sonic pulse that could [[stun]] most known organic life, to its highest setting "deteriorate", which emitted a [[Sonic disruptor|sonic beam]] capable of tearing through matter at the molecular level.<ref name="Gamer1" /><ref name="TNEGTWAT" />

==History==
Named after its designer, the cunning [[General/Legends|General]] [[Kruskob Tiltanka]] of the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]], the Kob sonic blaster saw widespread use among the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] military,<ref name="Gamer1" /> being especially prominent during the [[Battle of Iskalon (Nagai–Tof War)|invasion of Iskalon]]. On Iskalon they were tested on captives on the planet, before being deployed against [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] as they fought against the Nagai occupation.<ref name="SW102" /> Due to the power of the weapon, and the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] cultural focus on honorable duels, most Nagai military officers felt it was a dishonorable way to fight; a position that wasn't shared by [[General]] [[Kruskob Tiltanka|Kob]].<ref name="Gamer1" />
